Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin

Class ObservationSourcePluginBase

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ObservationSourcePluginBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlugin
Direct Known Subclasses:
AAVSOPhotometryURLObservationSourceBase, AIDWebServiceObservationSourcePluginBase, TextFormatObservationSourcePlugin
public abstract class ObservationSourcePluginBase extends Object implements IPlugin

This is the base class for all observation source plug-in classes.

An observation source plugin will appear in VStar's File menu or file load dialog (if the source loads from a file +/- a URL) when its jar file is placed into the vstar_plugins directory.

      Constructor

  • Method Details

    • getObservationRetriever

      public abstract AbstractObservationRetriever getObservationRetriever() throws IOException, ObservationReadError

      Get an observation retriever for this plug-in.

      A new observation retriever instance should be created for each call to this method to avoid side-effects relating to clearing of collections by Mediator upon each new-star-artefact creation operation.

      Returns:
      An observation retriever.
      Throws:
      IOException
      ObservationReadError

    • getCurrentStarName

      public String getCurrentStarName()
      Deprecated.
      Use getInputName() or getObservationRetriever() for more specific information about source name, type, and observations possibly containing object name.
      Get the name of the star associated with the current observation dataset.
      Returns:
      The current star name.

    • getInputType

      public abstract InputType getInputType()
      What is the input type for this plug-in?
      Returns:
      The input type.

    • getDocName

      public String getDocName()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Get a document file name for this plugin. Can be a full (absolute) URL or a file name that assumes the plugin doc directory as a base URL.
      Specified by:
      getDocName in interface IPlugin
      See Also:
      • IPlugin.getDocName()

    • getGroup

      public String getGroup()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Get the group to which this plugin belongs (may be null).
      Specified by:
      getGroup in interface IPlugin
      See Also:
      • IPlugin.getGroup()

    • setInputInfo

      public void setInputInfo(List<InputStream> inputStreams, String inputName)
      Sets the input streams and a representative name for these. TODO: wondering whether this needs to be deprecated
      Parameters:
      inputStreams - The input streams. Multiple streams may be required, e.g. one per filter or one to access data and another to access catalog information or multiple selected files.
      inputName - A name associated with the input (e.g. file, URL).

    • clearStreamNameMap

      public void clearStreamNameMap()
      Empty the stream-name map.

    • addStreamNamePair

      public void addStreamNamePair(InputStream stream, String name)
      Add an input-name, stream pair to the stream-name map, e.g. for error reporting.
      Parameters:
      stream - The input stream associated with the input name.
      name - A name associated with the input (e.g. file, URL).

    • nameFromStream

      public String nameFromStream(InputStream stream)
      Given an input stream, return the corresponding name.
      Parameters:
      stream - The input stream.
      Returns:
      The corresponding name.

    • getAdditionalFileExtensions

      public List<String> getAdditionalFileExtensions()
      Return a list of file extension strings to be added to the default file extensions in the file chooser, or null if none are to be added (the default).
      Returns:
      The list of file extension strings to be added to the file chooser.

    • getInputStreams

      public List<InputStream> getInputStreams()
      Returns:
      the input streams

    • getFiles

      public List<File> getFiles() throws Exception
      Deprecated.

      Return a list of File objects; defaults to null.

      NewStarFromObsSourcePlugin invokes this when the input type is FILE. If null is returned, a dialog is opened requesting a single File be selected. The purpose of this is so that when executed from a WebStart context, a plugin cannot create input streams. It can however create File objects, so if it wants to construct Files on the fly, this will be OK from a security policy perspective.
      Returns:
      a list of URLs or null.
      Throws:
      Exception - if a problem occurs during URL creation.

    • getURLs

      public List<URL> getURLs() throws Exception

      Return a list of URL objects; defaults to null.

      NewStarFromObsSourcePlugin invokes this when the input type is URL. If null is returned, a dialog is opened requesting a single URL be entered. The purpose of this is so that when executed from a WebStart context, a plugin cannot create input streams. It can however create URL objects, so if it wants to construct URLs on the fly, this will be OK from a security policy perspective.
      Returns:
      a list of URLs or null.
      Throws:
      Exception - if a problem occurs during URL creation.

    • getInputName

      public String getInputName()
      Returns:
      the name associated with the input (e.g. file, URL)

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Returns:
      the userName, e.g. for a URL based source; may be null

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Returns:
      the password, e.g. for a URL based source; may be null

    • getVisibleSeriesTypes

      public Set<SeriesType> getVisibleSeriesTypes()
      If a non-null value is return by this method, once all observations are loaded, a series visibility change message will be sent to ensure that all observations are visible.
      Returns:
      The set of visible series or null.

      public boolean requiresAuthentication()

      Does this plugin require authentication?

      requiresAuthentication in interface IPlugin
      Returns:
      Whether or not the plugin requires authentication.
      See Also:
      • IPlugin.requiresAuthentication()

    • additionalAuthenticationSatisfied

      public boolean additionalAuthenticationSatisfied(LoginInfo loginInfo)
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      This method will be called after requiresAuthentication() in case any additional authentication is required.
      Specified by:
      additionalAuthenticationSatisfied in interface IPlugin
      Parameters:
      loginInfo - The current session's login information.
      Returns:
      Whether or not any additional authentication has satisfied.
      See Also:
      • IPlugin.additionalAuthenticationSatisfied(org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.resources.LoginInfo)

      Returns:
      are loads currently additive?

      whether multiple file selection is permitted

      the velaFilterStr

      Parameters:
      velaFilterStr - the velaFilterStr to set

    • getNewStarType

      public NewStarType getNewStarType()
      This method returns the NewStarType enumerated value. Most observation sources will use the default implementation, a few may override it.
      Returns:
      The NewStarType enumerated value

    • test

      public Boolean test()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Method to be invoked in order to test this plug-in
      Specified by:
      test in interface IPlugin
      Returns:
      whether the test passed (true, false) or null meaning no test

    • inTestMode

      public boolean inTestMode()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Is the current invocation of the plug-in in test mode? This can help in design-for-test by allowing non-essential logic to change what code is invoked during a test.
      Specified by:
      inTestMode in interface IPlugin
      Returns:
      true or false

    • setTestMode

      public void setTestMode(boolean mode)
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Set the test mode. Each test() method must do this if required, and not all plug-in tests will require it.
      Specified by:
      setTestMode in interface IPlugin
      Parameters:
      mode - true or false, denoting whether in test mode

    • getTestRetriever

      protected AbstractObservationRetriever getTestRetriever(String[] lines, String inputName) throws InterruptedException, ObservationReadError, IOException
      Helper method that takes an array of lines (each string ending in "\n", sets the plugin's inputs and, retrieves the observations and returns the observation retriever.
      Parameters:
      lines - An array of linefeed-delimited strings
      inputName - An input name (arbitrary string)
      Returns:
      The observation retriever
      Throws:
      InterruptedException
      ObservationReadError
      IOException
